changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Career Aspirations Ⅱ"

TextENGNew: ``Wait... huh?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3087. You're going to Rikuo University too, Akira?!``
``Y-yeah...@k@vS20/39/VTT_akira3013. What, is that bad?``
``No, there's nothing wrong with it, but...``
Certainly, Rikuo University had a recently established art department, but it didn't have much history to it.
Also, the instructors didn't have a lot name recognition, so I heard only those who were really curious or less skilled aimed for it.

``With your skills and achievements, couldn't you get into the Tokyo College of the Arts?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3090. With all those honors and special scholarships like you've gotten at this school...``
``There are also a lot of great teachers there, and it would be a much better environment to get your name out there, so why not go that route?``
``I'm not really interested in drawing pictures to get my name out there.@k@vS20/39/VTT_akira3015. Plus...``
``Plus?``
``......@k@vS20/39/VTT_akira3017. N-no, it's nothing.``
He quickly shut his mouth to avoid answering... but once I saw how red his face was turning, I figured it out.

Come to think of it... I recently learned that the school that girl was aspiring to, Misaki University, was a sister school of Rikuo University. And as part of that relationship, I hear that some of their general education classes are conducted together.
So naturally, that would increase their opportunities to see each other face to face...

``Well now, it sounds like you've really fallen in love.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3094. I know you've only just confessed and you're still nervous, but you don't have to let her circumstances dictate your future, right?``
``Wha?!@k@vS20/39/VTT_akira3019. Th-that's not it. The college I picked has nothing to do with Kimiyoshi!!``
``Hmm?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3096. But I didn't say anything about Natsumi, did I~?``
Way to shoot yourself in the foot, Akira-kun. What a simple-minded guy~!
A thought suddenly came to me. If Natsumi knew about this, what would she think?

Akira's choice to enroll at Rikuo University didn't have much impact on my decision. Rather, it was the other way around. And even if we're in the same university, the department of arts and the pharmacology department are essentially completely different schools.
But... I advised Natsumi to ``set Rikuo University aside.``

It was obviously a poor choice given her current grades. And unlike my family, I heard that her family wouldn't allow her to aim for any universities except the ones where she could pass the entrance exams on the first try...
``Hey, Akira.``
``What's up?``
``Well... have you told Natsumi yet that you're planning to go to Rikuo University?``
``No, not yet... Is that a problem?``
``Yeah. ...There might be a slight issue.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3101. Could you keep this quiet from her for now?``
Akira didn't understand what I was getting at at first and stared blankly. But after hearing my explanation, he seemed convinced.
Akira didn't want there to be any strange misunderstandings either.
``Understood. I'll keep it quiet for a while.@k@vS20/39/VTT_akira3025. ...But it seems like I'm hiding something, and I don't feel good about that.``
``Oh my, so serious.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3103. With an attitude like that, she'd find out instantly if you ever cheated on her~.``
``I-I'd never cheat on her!!``
``Aa ha ha ha!!``
Anyway, we'll try talking to Natsumi about it when the time is right. And we'll emphasize the fact that Misaki and Rikuo are sister schools.
There's nothing to feel guilty about here. Once we explain everything properly, surely Natsumi will...
But... is that really how it will play out?
